title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates!
